title: SummerHacks
location: The ITM Group of Institutions is a group of educational institutions, Kharghar
description: Finalist (Top 10). Built an AI-powered unified inbox platform that connects email, Slack, WhatsApp, calendar, and other communication channels into a single intelligent workspace.The AI continuously monitors conversations, prioritizes important messages, summarizes discussions, extracts action items, schedules meetings, sends follow-ups, and automates routine tasks on behalf of the user.
